text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MBSF 30 CCW Chronic Conditions (CHRONIC) File │ March 2022 │ V 1.0 38 

GLAUCOMA_EVER 

LABEL: Date that beneficiary first met claims criteria for the glaucoma indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the Chronic Conditions 
Warehouse (CCW) glaucoma indicator. The variable will be blank for beneficiaries that have never had 
the condition. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: GLAUCOMA_EVER 

TYPE: DATE
